A fully integrated suite of APIs

Migration
For migration or anything related to migration.
Recovery
Recover lost or stolen tokens/coins.
Rectification
Retification support completely decentralized.
Claim Rev Share
Click here to claim your revenue share
Staking
Click here to stake your tokens and fix staking related issues.
Unstaking
Click here to unstake your tokens and fix unstaking related issues.
Claim Asset
To claim assets or have issues claiming assets

Coinbase Wallet app

Coinbase app

Connect with your Coinbase account

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
